'''Niebur Boton''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Niebur Boton was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. After some time, Boton completed her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and was [[Knighting Ceremony/Legends|elevated]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="EAP" />

When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Boton fought as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] within the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], as the war came to an end, the Republic's [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the Army's [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], a command ordering them to kill their Jedi leaders. Boton survived at first, but was eventually found by the newly risen [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Torture/Legends|Tortured]] by [[Inquisitorius/Legends|Inquisitor]] [[Antinnis Tremayne]], Boton succumbed to the intense interrogation and revealed the names of several of her surviving comrades. Boton died soon after and her body was transported to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by several Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Meeting the body at its landing site, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] took up the fallen Jedi's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and mutilated her body with it.<ref name="EAP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' {{1st}}
